chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, ACJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-2962 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.24732/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on CMA No.14282/2023 (Exemption). 4. For order on CMA No.14283/2023 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th November 2023 Mr. Abdul Salam Memon alongwith Ms. Rabya Javed, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner undertakes to comply with office objection before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner will not press instant petition and would approach the Worthy Caretaker Chief Minister of Sindh for redressal of his grievance regarding disposal of review filed by the petitioner, which is pending since 2021, in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application in the aforesaid terms. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
